_comment: 《铃兰穿越记》第005集(arc-01/005 提笔死局)。头钩=E04尾钩:纸笔摆到面前,写名字自证。原主一手好字,她连'沈'都不会写→急中生智装手抖打翻墨。尾钩:顾晏辞抓腕→原主没有的旧疤。连戏:红嫁衣(长袖金绣);顾晏辞深炭西装(只出手)。本集中文:写你的名字。逻辑:她对'疤'的反应来自看见他盯着疤(视觉情境),非听懂台词。

shots.content: The stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride in the SAME long-sleeved ornate red traditional wedding dress with gold embroidery sits at a dark carved wooden desk, completely ALONE in the frame, NO other person, NO foreground figure — staring down in dread at a sheet of blank white rice paper, an ink brush and a black inkstone laid out before her, her hands frozen on the edge of the desk, dim opulent mansion study light, single face in frame. Cinematic medium close-up. Landscape.

captions.zh: 他冷冷把纸笔推到我面前
captions.local: Anh ta lạnh lùng đẩy giấy bút tới trước mặt
Nhưng tôi không biết viết một nét nào

shots.content: Still life close-up: an old letter of elegant flowing Chinese brush calligraphy on aged rice paper, artistically blurred with shallow depth of field so the characters are soft and unreadable, beside it a jade paperweight and a dried plum blossom, warm lamplight on a dark carved wooden desk, absolutely no people. Cinematic landscape still.

captions.local: Thanh Ngô thật viết chữ rất đẹp

captions.zh: 她连一个「沈」字都写不出
captions.local: còn cô, một chữ Thẩm cũng không viết nổi

shots.content: Extreme close-up: a slender pale female hand emerging from an ornate RED silk sleeve with gold embroidery, holding a Chinese ink calligraphy brush hovering and TREMBLING above a sheet of blank white rice paper, a heavy drop of black ink about to fall from the brush tip, knuckles tense, dark carved wooden desk, dim warm lamplight, no face visible, absolutely no other person. Cinematic macro shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Làm sao đây, làm sao đây
Đầu bút treo lơ lửng trên giấy

shots.content: Dramatic overhead close-up: a black stone inkstone knocked over on a dark carved wooden desk, glossy black ink splashing and spreading across a sheet of white rice paper, ink droplets in mid-air, an ink brush rolling off the paper, the edge of a red silk sleeve with gold embroidery retreating at the frame corner, warm lamplight, no face visible, absolutely no other person. Cinematic high-angle shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Trong lúc nguy cấp, cô nảy ra một kế
Cô giả vờ run tay, hất đổ nghiên mực

shots.content: Tense close-up, NOT a handshake: a strong male hand in a dark charcoal suit sleeve with white shirt cuff CLAMPS around a slender pale female wrist like a shackle from above, forcing her palm to turn upward toward the camera; her red silk sleeve with gold embroidery is pushed up, and on the exposed INNER side of her fair wrist there is a CLEARLY VISIBLE pale old scar — a thin raised healed scar line about three centimeters long; ink stains on her fingertips, ink-splashed paper on the desk below, dramatic warm lamplight, only the two hands and forearms visible, NO faces, absolutely no other body parts. Cinematic macro shot. Landscape.

captions.local: Anh ta bất ngờ nắm lấy cổ tay cô

captions.pinyin: zhè dào bā nǎ lái de
captions.local: Vết sẹo này ở đâu ra
Anh ta đang nhìn cổ tay tôi
Tôi chưa từng thấy vết sẹo này
Vết sẹo cũ mà Thanh Ngô thật không có
sao lại nằm trên cổ tay cô
